untranslatable_reason: The signal requires identification of the EADB (Equal Arm Double Bottom) pattern structure, specifically: (1) locating two equal bottoms, (2) identifying the highest high between them, (3) calculating pattern height as the difference between highest high and lowest bottom, and (4) computing the exact confirmation/breakout price. These pattern-recognition mechanics cannot be expressed using only the allowed price indicators and operators. The backtest engine would need a dedicated pattern-detection module or custom indicator for EADB formation identification.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses pivot point as a proxy for the confirmation level, but this does not capture the true EADB geometry. The 40% average rise and success rates (66% bull / 47% bear) are documented but cannot be codified as entry/exit rules. Stop loss set conservatively at 5% as author did not specify; recommend using ATR-based stop once pattern is properly detected.
